source_meta.source_document: Variable Angle LCP Two-Column Volar Distal Radius Plate

TRAYS.Tray Name: Distal Radius Plate and Instrument Set
TRAYS.Tray Notes: Official DePuy Synthes materials describe dedicated distal radius plating instrumentation used with the variable-angle volar plate family.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: Official J&J MedTech materials describe the variable-angle two-column volar distal radius plate family.
Official inventory and technique materials describe compatible locking screw fixation used with the distal radius plate system.
Official technique materials describe guides and instrumentation for controlled distal radius screw placement.
